plugins.name: stn-skills
plugins.description: Enterprise AI development pipeline — from idea to verified code. Multi-lens brainstorming, zero-placeholder DAG planning, checkpoint-verified execution with fidelity scoring, and 13-domain codebase auditing. 8 skills, 7 enforcement hooks, technology-agnostic. Research-backed: structured decomposition yields 12-18% higher correctness; per-step verification prevents 20-27% quality degradation.
